calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Unopposed Motion To Dismiss Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DONALD VINING, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF OTHER AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES PURSUANT TO THE CALIFORNIA PRIVATE ATTORNEYS GENERAL ACT's Unopposed Motion To Dismiss Action.

The unopposed motion to dismiss plaintiff Donald Vining's claims with prejudice and his representative claims without prejudice is granted. Labor Code, section 2699, subdivision (s)(2), requires this court to review and approve any settlement of any civil action filed pursuant to this part. The court has done so and under the circumstances here concludes that the private settlement between Vining and defendant Hat World, Inc. does not prejudice absent allegedly aggrieved employees. The parties present evidence that two other PAGA actions are pending that overlap with this one and that preliminary approval has been granted of a settlement that will resolve the representative claims.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
